suiteName: CyberSource Payment - Functional, Validation, UX, Edge Cases

testCases.title: CyberSource - Special Chars in Name
testCases.notes: Hyphen, apostrophe, accented chars, period all accepted

testCases.title: CyberSource - Invalid Card Number
testCases.notes: 1234567890123456 blocks submission, no card type detected

testCases.title: CyberSource - Empty Cardholder Name
testCases.notes: BUG FIXED - previously submitted without name, now correctly blocks submission

testCases.title: CyberSource - Expired Card
testCases.notes: 01/2020 shows Expiration date must be in the future

testCases.title: CyberSource - Invalid Expiry Format
testCases.notes: 13 and 00 show Provide a valid expiration month

testCases.title: CyberSource - Non-numeric CVV
testCases.notes: abc rejected by iframe, field stays empty

testCases.title: CyberSource - Visa Detection
testCases.notes: Icons visible, minor - no strong differentiation for detected type

testCases.title: Payment Form - Field Labels
testCases.notes: All fields labeled with asterisks, helpful placeholders

testCases.title: Payment Form - Tab Order
testCases.notes: Card -> Name -> Expiry -> CVV, no tab traps

testCases.title: PCI Security (6 tests)
testCases.notes: Iframes, HTTPS, JWT, no card data leakage - see security-results.json
